'''''Star Wars Weekly'' 105''' is the one hundred fifth issue in the ''[[Star Wars Weekly]]'' series of comic reprints, published on [[February 27]], [[1980]]. It included the original story "[[Day of the Assassins!]]".

==Contents==
*"[[Day of the Assassins!]]"
*"Deathlok the Demolisher Part 15: The one who might lead Deathlok to his goal!"
*"Tales of the Watcher: I was a victim of Venus!"
*Star Profile: [[Anthony Daniels]]
